author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--improve-gitignore
content: Plan: Add gitignore generation to crosslink init. Key changes: (1) Add a write_root_gitignore() function that manages a marked section in root .gitignore with entries for .crosslink/ machine-local state and .claude/ auto-generated files. Use section markers (# === Crosslink managed ===) for idempotent replacement on re-init. (2) Update the existing .crosslink/.gitignore generation to include all machine-local files (issues.db*, session.json, daemon.pid, .cache/). (3) Add 'DO track' comments explaining what IS committed. (4) Add tests for fresh creation, idempotent re-init, and preserving user entries.
